parameters.name: Mosquitto Configuration
parameters.description:
Upload your mosquitto.conf file.
With the **SSL addon** (mode: Certificates only), TLS certs are provisioned at:
- `/mosquitto/config/certs/fullchain.pem` (server cert + CA)
- `/mosquitto/config/certs/privkey.pem` (private key)
- `/mosquitto/config/certs/chain.pem` (CA cert)

MQTTS listener example:
```
listener 8883
cafile /mosquitto/config/certs/chain.pem
certfile /mosquitto/config/certs/fullchain.pem
keyfile /mosquitto/config/certs/privkey.pem
```
See [Mosquitto TLS docs](https://mosquitto.org/man/mosquitto-conf-5.html)

parameters.name: Shared Volume Path
parameters.description: Path to the shared volume mount point

parameters.description: Mapped user ID for unprivileged containers
